## Source & reproducibility
<!-- Link the public source + the exact command/steps to re-check. -->

## Confidence
- [ ] ✅ Confirmed (reproducible)
- [ ] 🟡 Strong signal / watching
- [ ] ⚖️ Adds a caveat / limit

## Checklist
- [ ] Claims point to a public source or reproducible command
- [ ] No naming a person/company as criminal without independent proof
- [ ] No price predictions or buy/sell calls
- [ ] If I added a study, it's in `/studies` (from `_TEMPLATE.md`) and I added my row to `studies/README.md`
- [ ] If I changed the site, I kept the structure + `data-i18n` markers (and updated `i18n.js` PT if I changed text)
